title: Garlic Lemon Chicken with Broccoli
steps: Season chicken breast with salt, pepper, and minced garlic.
Sear in olive oil over medium-high heat, 6-7 min per side.
Steam broccoli until tender-crisp, about 5 min.
Squeeze fresh lemon over chicken and broccoli before serving.

title: Chickpea Spinach Curry
steps: Saute diced onion and garlic in olive oil until soft.
Add canned tomatoes and simmer 5 min.
Stir in chickpeas and cook 10 min.
Fold in spinach until wilted, season to taste.

title: Shrimp Fried Rice
steps: Cook rice and let cool (day-old rice works best).
Scramble eggs in a hot pan, set aside.
Stir-fry shrimp, garlic, and diced carrots until shrimp is pink.
Add rice, soy sauce, and scrambled eggs; toss to combine.

title: Overnight Oats with Honey and Almonds
steps: Combine oats and milk in a jar, refrigerate overnight.
Top with sliced banana, honey, and chopped almonds before eating.

title: Baked Salmon with Quinoa and Lemon
steps: Cook quinoa according to package instructions.
Season salmon with garlic, olive oil, salt, and pepper.
Bake salmon at 400F for 12-15 min until flaky.
Serve over quinoa with a squeeze of lemon.

title: Tofu Stir-Fry with Bell Peppers
steps: Press and cube tofu, pan-fry until golden.
Stir-fry bell peppers and carrots until tender-crisp.
Add soy sauce and garlic, toss with tofu.
Serve over white rice.

title: Greek Yogurt Berry Parfait
steps: Layer greek yogurt with diced apple in a glass.
Drizzle with honey and top with chopped almonds.

title: Pasta with Tomato and Garlic
steps: Cook pasta until al dente.
Saute garlic and onion in olive oil.
Add canned tomatoes, simmer into a sauce, 10 min.
Toss pasta with sauce.
